body.purpose: General body text and information reading.

shadows.name: whisper-glow
shadows.purpose: Soft dark separation layer on cards.

motion.name: ease-spring
motion.purpose: Tactile bouncing transition for interactive widgets.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Tactile pill-shaped action button with scale feedback.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #d4b055; color: #181715; font-family: 'Geist', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; padding: 12px 28px; border-radius: 9999px; border: none; transition: transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), background-color 200ms ease; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #f4efe6; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Glass Panel Card
components.description: Premium glassmorphism background tile for features or posts.
components.html:
Creative Direction

We craft interfaces that feel right and respect details.
components.css: .ds-card { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; color: #f4efe6; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); } .ds-card h3 { font-family: 'Prata', serif; font-size: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #d4b055; } .ds-card p { font-family: 'Geist', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: rgba(244, 239, 230, 0.8); line-height: 1.5; }

narrative.overview: This system represents a high-agency developer and AI specialist portfolio. The visual atmosphere is one of creative technicality, merging highly structured monospaced layout elements (terminal, statistics) with the elegance of classical editorial layouts. It is characterized by generous whitespace, dynamic custom page transitions, and subtle spring-driven micro-interactions.
keyCharacteristics: High-contrast luxurious pairing of warm obsidian and antique gold.
Fluid layout rhythm with a mixture of monospace metadata lines and large serif typography.
Consistent rounded geometries (buttons are always full-pills, interactive cards are rounded to 12px).

rules.name: The Color Contrast Lock
rules.body: Any text or icon elements overlaid directly on a gold background MUST be rendered in near-black Warm Obsidian (#181715) to ensure readability and WCAG AA compliance.

rules.name: The Emphasis Lock
rules.body: When emphasizing a word within a headline, use italicized or bold styles of the same font family. Never inject a sans-serif word into a serif headline.

dos: Do respect the :active scale state (scale(0.97)) on all clickable elements to provide physical tactile feedback.
Do wrap code elements, command logs, and timestamps strictly in JetBrains Mono.
donts: Don't use standard template layouts or symmetric grids.
Don't use neon purple or blue gradients as text highlights or button backdrops.
Don't use the Inter font for headings or visual display elements; use Prata and Geist instead.
